title: Device(headset) is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Verify successful registration of a paired headset to the Lens Cloud inventory list.
steps: Start the Lens app with no headsets connected.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account and log in with credentials.
Go to lens server inventory and confirm the device list shows only the Mobile app.
Pair a new headset with the app.
Refresh the Lens Cloud inventory page.
expected: The new headset appears on the inventory list.
